answer:
Squarespace does not offer a free tier [1][2]. While they provide a 14-day free trial for new websites, access to Commerce APIs generally requires a paid subscription, specifically the Commerce Advanced plan for custom application development [3][1].

Developers can utilize the Squarespace Developer Platform to customize templates and enable Developer Mode [4][5]. Notably, trial sites with Developer Mode enabled do not expire, allowing for extended time to build custom sites [5]. To access Commerce APIs, you must generate an API key within your site settings or use OAuth 2.0 to build Squarespace Extensions [3].
